system_overview.objective: A hardened, role-gated state machine replacing the temporal-heavy V1 schema.
system_overview.storage: Local SQLite database acting as the isolated edge cache.

admin_console.view_logic: Global view. Maps dm_urgency, hm_priority, assigned_tech. Triggers COMPLETED state.

tech_edge_node.view_logic: Strictly filtered array: status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND assigned_tech === userRole.
tech_edge_node.write_matrix: Can mutate status to IN_PROGRESS or PENDING_REVIEW. Can inject consumed_sku and manual_log.

state_machine.IN_PROGRESS: Technician actuates start. Temporal lock: execution_start = COALESCE(execution_start, time.time()).
state_machine.PENDING_REVIEW: Technician completes edge work. Temporal lock: execution_end = time.time().
state_machine.PENDING_REVIEW_REJECTION: Admin rejects the payload. State reverts to IN_PROGRESS. Edge Node re-engages. execution_start timestamp remains locked via COALESCE.
state_machine.COMPLETED: Admin approval. Temporal lock: completed_at = time.time(). Triggers Universal Archival Handover.

universal_archival_engine.trigger_event: Asynchronous Pub/Sub JSON file drop to Archival_Queue/ upon MWO transitioning to COMPLETED state.
universal_archival_engine.rollover_constraint: The [SEQUENCE_ID] integer MUST strictly reset to 0001 on the first day of a new calendar month. Continuous rollover across months is a fatal architectural violation.
universal_archival_engine.template_routing: Agent dispatches JSON payload to mwo_template.html based on document_type header.
universal_archival_engine.file_handover_protocol: Atomic Drop Protocol: FastAPI writes .tmp file to Archival_Queue/, flushes, then os.rename() to .json to prevent consumer race conditions.
